utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, price, details, property_taxes) — fully specified. 
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (program, mortgage_amount, interest_rate, amortization, monthly_payment, down_payment, government_rebate, pre_approval_valid) — fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (company, contact, phone, email, cost, timeline) — fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (company, contact, phone, email, cost, timeline) — fully specified. 
- setup_services: utility and setup services (utilities with contact, services, cost, timeline; property_survey with contact, cost, timeline) — fully specified. 
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (includes property_price, down_payment, mortgage_amount, legal_services, property_survey, moving_services, utilities_setup, government_rebate, total_upfront_costs, monthly_mortgage_payment, annual_property_taxes, funds_remaining) — fully specified. Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that correspond to items in the ground-truth ratings: a purchase property at CAD $650K with 140m² and double garage matches 'Family House'; financing uses 'First-Time Buyer Program' which aligns with 'First-Time Buyer' mortgage; legal services priced at CAD $1,200 with premium features maps to 'Premium Legal Package'; the property survey at CAD $650 aligns with 'Full Structural Survey'; moving services at CAD $650 matches 'Standard Moving'; utilities setup at CAD $280 corresponds to 'Premium Utilities'.
